title: Truly Madly Deeply Black 60mm Wide x 2 Metres Long Wired Organza Ribbon. Great for Birthday Decoration, Gift wrap, Christmas Ribbon, Wreath Making Supplies, DIY Crafting
features: 2 Metres of Black Sheer Organza ribbon, wound on a card. Christmas Organza Ribbon can be used as Christmas wrapping ribbon or to make Christmas tree ribbon bows and to compliment your Christmas wrapping accessories

High quality wired edge sheer organza ribbon, 60mm wide. A length of organza florist ribbon, wide ribbon useful for gift ribbon, birthday ribbon bow making, wreath ribbon, wedding car ribbon, Christmas wrapping ribbon and ribbons for gift wrapping
Our gorgeous organza chiffon ribbon can be made into autumnal decorations, used for wedding decorations, as organza chair bows and loops and is perfect for birthday gift wrap and wedding gift wrap
This beautiful ribbon is a decorative ribbon, great for gift wrapping and making ribbon bows, birthday bows or gift decoration. Colours may look slightly different on different computer screens
Whether it's a Christmas organza ribbon, a wrapping paper ribbon, xmas ribbon, Easter wired ribbon or gift wrap ribbon our wired ribbon is a perfect long ribbon for all your needs
description: Our gorgeous Black sheer ribbon is 2 Metres long, this ribbon is a generous 60mm wide and it makes an ideal present wrapping ribbon. This Black organza ribbon has a wired edge making it perfect for wedding craft projects, to use as chair ribbon or wedding car ribbon. The ribbon has a wired edge making it perfect for birthday decoration and to make ribbon bows and loops which hold their shapes and will enhance your gift wrap, wedding cars, table centrepieces, the backs of reception chairs, or the ends of pews in the church. Buy different coloured ribbon to add to your present wrapping accessories or your xmas wreath making supplies. Made of a sheer material this wired ribbon is perfect as Christmas tree ribbon or birthday gift wrap and is suitable for all your decorative ribbon projects. You can use it to enhance floral arrangements or wrap special gifts, in fact to decorate just about anything! This ribbon is perfect for a very wide range of uses and can be used all year round, whether it's for wrapping Christmas presents, birthday decoration and birthday gift wrap, wedding gift wrap, Easter gift wrap, valentines day, etc. You name it, this ribbon is perfect for all of them.
